message:
style: apply goimports formatting across codebase

Apply goimports with local-prefixes for github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm
to standardize import ordering and grouping across all Go files.

This ensures imports are consistently ordered:
1. Standard library imports
2. Third-party imports
3. Local project imports (github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
